body.en:
This is it — the final lesson! You've built an app from scratch, styled it, and debugged it. Now it's time to **polish it up and ship it** to the internet.

By the end of this lesson, you'll have a **live app** with a URL you can share with anyone.
body.zh:
最后一课！你从零构建了应用、设计了样式、调试了bug。现在是时候**润色并发布**到互联网了。

这节课结束时，你将有一个可以分享给任何人的**在线应用**。

body.en:
Before shipping, let's do a quick check:

- Does the app load without errors?
- Do all buttons work as expected?
- Does it look good on mobile?
- Is the title and description correct?
- Does data save and load properly?

Ask Claude to help: "Check my app for any issues before I deploy."
body.zh:
上线前快速检查：

- 应用能否无错误加载？
- 所有按钮是否正常工作？
- 手机上好看吗？
- 标题和描述正确吗？
- 数据能否正确保存和加载？

让Claude帮忙：「部署前检查我的应用有没有问题。」

body.en:
Small details make a big difference:

- **Add a favicon** — the small icon in the browser tab
- **Update the page title** — what shows in the browser tab
- **Add a meta description** — for when you share the link
- **Test on different screen sizes** — resize your browser

Claude can handle all of these with one request: "Add finishing touches — favicon, meta tags, and make sure it works on all screen sizes."
body.zh:
小细节产生大影响：

- **添加favicon** —— 浏览器标签中的小图标
- **更新页面标题** —— 浏览器标签显示的内容
- **添加meta描述** —— 分享链接时的说明
- **测试不同屏幕尺寸** —— 调整浏览器大小

Claude一个请求就能处理：「添加最后的润色——favicon、meta标签，确保所有屏幕尺寸都好用。」

body.en: Deploy your finished app to Cloudflare Pages!
body.zh: 把你的应用部署到Cloudflare Pages！

expectedCommands.output:
✓ Uploading files...
✓ Building project...
✓ Deployment complete!

🎉 Your app is live at:
https://my-task-tracker.pages.dev

Share this link with the world!
expectedCommands.successMsg: YOUR APP IS LIVE! You did it! 🎉🚀

body.en:
Let's take a moment to appreciate everything you've done in 2 weeks:

- Learned to use the terminal
- Installed and used Claude Code
- Built a webpage from scratch
- Understood HTML, CSS, and JavaScript basics
- Deployed your first site
- Planned and built a real app
- Added interactivity and styling
- Debugged like a developer
- Shipped a live app to the internet

**You went from zero coding experience to a deployed app.** That's incredible.
body.zh:
花一点时间感受你在2周内完成的一切：

- 学会使用终端
- 安装并使用Claude Code
- 从零构建网页
- 理解HTML、CSS和JavaScript基础
- 部署了第一个网站
- 规划并构建真正的应用
- 添加了交互和样式
- 像开发者一样调试
- 上线了真实的应用

**你从零编程经验到部署了一个应用。**这太了不起了。

body.en:
Your learning doesn't stop here. With the skills you have, you can:

- **Build more projects** — each one teaches you something new
- **Add features** — make your apps more complex over time
- **Help others** — teach friends what you've learned
- **Put it on your resume** — "Built and deployed web applications using AI tools"

The most important thing: **keep building**. Every project makes you better.
body.zh:
你的学习不会到此结束。凭借现有技能，你可以：

- **构建更多项目** —— 每个都教你新东西
- **添加功能** —— 逐渐让应用更复杂
- **帮助他人** —— 教朋友你学到的
- **写进简历** —— 「使用AI工具构建并部署了Web应用」

最重要的：**继续构建**。每个项目都让你更厉害。

title.zh: 最后检查：你是建造者了！

body.en: One last quiz to celebrate how far you've come!
body.zh: 最后一个测验来庆祝你走了多远！

question.en: What should you do when you see an error?
question.zh: 看到错误时应该怎么做？

options.en: Copy the error and ask Claude to help fix it

explanation.en: Bugs are normal! Copy the error, give it to Claude, and iterate. That's the debugging process.
explanation.zh: Bug是正常的！复制错误，给Claude，然后迭代。这就是调试流程。

question.en: What's the most important skill in AI-assisted coding?
question.zh: AI辅助编程最重要的技能是什么？

explanation.en: You're the director! Clear communication is the superpower. You've proven that throughout this entire course.
explanation.zh: 你是导演！清晰的沟通是超能力。你在整个课程中已经证明了这一点。

body.en:
You started this course not knowing what a terminal was. Now you have **a live app on the internet** that you built with AI.

You are proof that **anyone can build with AI** — no CS degree required. The future belongs to people who can communicate their ideas to AI tools and ship real things.

That's you now. Go build something amazing! 🚀
body.zh:
你开始这个课程时还不知道终端是什么。现在你有了**一个用AI构建的在线应用**。

你证明了**任何人都能用AI构建**——不需要计算机学位。未来属于能够向AI工具传达想法并发布真实产品的人。

那就是现在的你。去做一些了不起的东西吧！🚀
